title: AIIMS Delhi is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: AIIMS Delhi is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
